title: Autonomous Evolution Framework
description: Framework for self-healing and recursive optimization of the factory library and agent swarm.
requirements: Recursive audit cycles for library health monitoring.
Automatic remediation of structural drift in distributed shards.
Dynamic agent skill injection based on performance telemetry.
Zero-downtime evolution of core orchestration engines.
components: EvolutionController: Manages the recursive optimization loops.
SkillInjector: Provisions new skills to active sub-agents.
